_comment: Pinned OPA release + per-asset SHA-256 checksums, bundled in the plugin. The monitor's OPA provisioner (arbiter-core/src/bundle/opa-provision.ts) downloads the per-OS/arch asset from ${downloadBaseUrl}/v<version>/<asset> and REFUSES to install any binary whose sha256 does not match the value here. Pinned to the server's OPA major (1.16.x) so local Rego-v1 bundles evaluate with matching semantics. Hashes verified from the official open-policy-agent/opa v1.16.2 GitHub release asset digests (2026-07-06). To bump: change version, re-pull the release-asset sha256 digests, and replace every value below.
